## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Language design change
- [ ] Generator change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I updated [public docs](https://github.com/ccl-lang/ccl-lang.github.io) under `ccl-lang.github.io/src/content/docs` when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I avoided reflection in CCL core code and generated output.
- [ ] I returned clear errors instead of panics for user input or runtime conditions.
- [ ] I kept Go files organized by category.
- [ ] I checked generated output for idiomatic target-language behavior.

## Tests

Commands run:

```txt

```

## Generated Output

If generated output changed, explain the target languages affected and whether the change is breaking.

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention anything reviewers should inspect closely.
